title: Blackbody Radiation
description: A hot cavity radiates electromagnetic energy at all frequencies. Classical physics predicts infinite total power — the ultraviolet catastrophe. Switch between Classical and Quantum modes to watch Planck's quantization hypothesis tame the divergence: high-frequency modes freeze out when their energy quantum hν exceeds the thermal energy kT.
interactive_controls: Preset temperatures (Room / Bulb / Sun / Blue star)
